name: Iron Metabolism (HFE)
description: Hereditary hemochromatosis variants — excess iron absorption.

snps.description: Primary clinical variant; homozygotes have high penetrance for iron overload.

AG.note: Heterozygous — mild iron-loading tendency; monitor ferritin.

AA.note: Homozygous — high risk of clinical hemochromatosis; requires monitoring and possible therapeutic phlebotomy.

snps.description: Secondary variant; lower penetrance than C282Y but compound heterozygotes (C282Y/H63D) have meaningful risk.

GG.note: Homozygous — modest iron-loading risk; monitor ferritin.

snps.description: Minor variant; compound heterozygosity with C282Y may matter.

AT.note: Heterozygous — clinically significant only with C282Y on other allele.
